description_long: This is a weathered stone sculpture of a robed male figure standing on a rectangular plinth. The figure wears a long, ornate cloak with detailed textures and a cap, and holds a large, elaborate object—possibly a cross or staff—close to his chest. The facial features are expressive, with a beard and a gentle, contemplative expression. The drapery of the robe is intricately carved, showing deep folds and realistic fabric flow. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the cloak falling straight down and minimal ornamentation. The entire piece has a gray, aged patina, suggesting exposure to the elements over time.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a robed male figure holding an ornate object, standing on a rectangular plinth with detailed drapery and a contemplative expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, ornate cloak, and the object held in both hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the cloak and the profile of the object held.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad, simple back of the cloak and the plinth base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the drapery, and the object extending forward.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure holding an ornate object
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
